versions.version_description: I started with the tab submitted byKurt1964 then transposed it to G so that some missing chords could easily be played. PLEASE NOTE: For Gaug -use a cowboy G chord but hit the Eb on the D string with your index finger. For FAF - play an F chord on the high EBGD strings but leave the B string open. Play the G7 by moving the index finger up one space to E on the D string. Em/Eb just play an Em and drop the E on the D string to an Eb. Em7 just l=eave the D string open and hit the B on the A string. Em/C# play an E on the D string and a C# on the A string. For Cadd9 just hit the C on the B string and leave the rest open. .
A version convenient for guitar players in the original key (with capo at 1st fret) also has Intro and Outro parts.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Broken Hearted Me:Anne Murray.
#7 on Pop Charts and #1 on Country in 1979.

INTRO:  [ch]C#[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]

#1.                      
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]C#[/ch]             [ch]C#7[/ch]      
Every now and then I cry, every night you keep staying on my mind..[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]     [ch]Ebm[/ch]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]       [ch]C#[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch] 
all my friends say I’ll survive...it just takes time.[/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
But I don’t think time is going to heal this broken heart,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]                 [ch]Ebm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
no, I don’t see how it can, if it’s broken all apart.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]       [ch]C#[/ch]             [ch]Bbm[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]
A million miracles could never stop the pain,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
or put all the pieces together again.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
No, I don’t think time is going to heal this broken heart,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]Ebm[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
no, I don’t see how it can while we are still apart.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]             [ch]Bbm[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
And when you hear this song I hope that you will se..e,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#[/ch]         [ch]Bbm[/ch]    [ch]Ebm[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]C#[/ch]
that time won’t heal a broken hearted me.[/tab]

[ch]C#[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]

#2.
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]C#7[/ch]
Every day is just the same, playing games..different lovers, [/tab]

different names.

They keep saying I’ll survive...it just takes time.[/tab]

A seventies smash from Kraziekhat.
